title: Smart Pearl
description: "Throw Ender Pearls with a single hotkey directly from your inventory or hotbar—featuring intelligent anti-cheat protection and a smart auto-refill system."
body:
# 🌀 **Smart Pearl**

Smart Pearl is a lightweight, high-performance utility mod for Fabric that revolutionizes your ender pearl management. Stop fumbling with your hotbar – throw pearls instantly via hotkey while the mod handles the logic in the background.

## **✨ Features**

### **🚀 Instant-Throw Keybind:** 

Throw an ender pearl with a single press (Default: V). The mod automatically swaps to a pearl slot, throws, and switches back to your previous item in milliseconds!

♻️ **Auto-Refill System:**

When you close your inventory, the mod automatically refills your hotbar stacks from your main inventory, ensuring you're always combat-ready.

### **📊 Minimalist HUD:**

Displays the total count of all pearls in your inventory right next to your hotbar.
![Pearl Count HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/887853679dca7b6a7f64fcb22cafa2bc62b8bff6.png)

![Pearl Count HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b65270b237d963cb9a029007a0a0dd8592df10f3.png)
Features a scaled-down counter for a clean, professional look.

Includes a live Cooldown Timer (in seconds) so you know exactly when your next pearl is ready.

### **⚙️ In-Game Configuration:** 

Use the /smartpearl command to open a custom settings screen and adjust the Auto-Refill window via a slider.

![Configuration Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5224612824a2d63da301fb08d27e793e3378cd5_0.webp)

### **🛠 How to Use**

**Set your Keybind:** Go to your Options -> Controls and bind Throw Smart Pearl to your preferred key.

**Throwing:** Just press the key. The mod will scan your hotbar for pearls and execute the throw sequence.

**Adjusting:** Use /smartpearl to fine-tune the refill timer (Default: 0.3s) to match your playstyle.

## **📦 Installation**

Requires Fabric Loader & Fabric API.

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.

Client-Side Only: This mod does not need to be installed on the server. It works on most servers, provided their rules allow for automated slot-swapping utilities.
